title: Home - Driver Policy Wiki
body: Welcome to the Driver Policy Wiki. Central source for all Ridgeline Freight Solutions driver policies and SOPs.

title: Dispatch Communication Protocol
body: Standard operating procedure for dispatch-driver communication including scanner protocols and message routing rules.

title: Hours of Service (HOS) Compliance Guide
body: Federal HOS regulations and Ridgeline-specific policies for electronic logging device usage and rest requirements.

title: Fuel Card & Expense Reimbursement Policy
body: Guidelines for Comdata fuel card usage caps per-fill limits and expense reimbursement submission procedures.

title: Independent Truck Stop Safety Policy
body: Ridgeline policy on independent non-chain truck stop usage including safety flagging criteria and driver reporting process.

title: Winter Driving Safety Protocol
body: Mandatory winter driving procedures including chain-up requirements corridor-specific hazard protocols and black ice reporting.

title: Pre-Trip Inspection Checklist
body: Standard pre-trip inspection procedure covering brakes tires lights coupling devices and seasonal addenda.

title: SB-2026-014: HOS Electronic Logging Update
body: SUPERSEDED - HOS electronic logging rule changes from June 2026. Replaced by SB-2026-022. Do not reference for current policy.

title: SB-2026-022: HOS ELD Firmware Patch v4.2
body: Updated HOS ELD firmware requirements following tablet firmware patch v4.2 rollout. Addresses session token reset bug.

title: SB-2026-018: Fleet Tablet Cold-Start Advisory
body: Advisory for fleet tablet cold-start reboot loop affecting Lenovo Tab M10 units. Includes manual recovery steps and firmware update schedule.

title: SB-2027-001: I-20 Shoulder Construction Zone Warning
body: Construction zone advisory for I-20 westbound between mile markers 118 and 124 near Oxford AL. Reduced shoulder width through March 2027.

title: Truck Stop Atlas - Reconciliation Process
body: Process for reconciling Airtable truck stop ratings with corporate atlas data. Covers field mapping discrepancy flagging and quarterly review cadence.

title: Winter Corridor Safety Review - Feb 2027 Prep
body: Working document for the Feb 5 2027 winter corridor safety review leadership meeting with Mike Hensley. Includes agenda data sources and action items.

title: Fleet Stop Utilization Dashboard Guide
body: How to read and interpret the fleet stop utilization dashboard including monthly driver count trends and incident rate calculations.

title: Fleet Tablet Deployment & Troubleshooting
body: Guide for fleet tablet setup factory reset and firmware troubleshooting. Covers cold-start reboot loop fix and ELD reconnection procedure.

title: Driver Rep Meeting Preparation Checklist
body: Checklist template for senior driver reps preparing briefs for leadership meetings. Includes data pull timeline and slide deck requirements.

title: SB-2026-001: I-65 Bridge Deck Ice Advisory
body: Advisory for bridge deck icing conditions on I-65 corridor between Birmingham and Nashville. Includes known problem bridges and suggested speed reductions.

title: SB-2026-009: I-75 Fog Advisory - Chattanooga Corridor
body: Dense fog advisory for I-75 southbound through Ringgold GA to Chattanooga TN. Affects early morning runs October through March.
